scenes.title: Demon Hunter in Ruined Cathedral
scenes.description: A lone hunter with a long coat and shotgun facing a horned demon in the nave of a ruined gothic cathedral, shattered stained glass, moonlight beams through broken vaults.

scenes.title: Ghostly Procession in the Cemetery
scenes.description: A procession of translucent ghost figures winding through an overgrown Victorian cemetery at dusk, wrought iron gates, gnarled trees, fog hugging the ground.

scenes.title: Vampire in Gothic Castle
scenes.description: A pale vampire in a high-collared coat standing on a castle balcony under a blood-red moon, bat-wing shadows, spires reaching into storm clouds.

scenes.title: Folklore Monster in Dark Forest
scenes.description: A towering antlered creature made of twisted wood and moss emerging from the mist between ancient trees, will-o'-wisps floating in the dark.

scenes.title: Cosmic Horror in Ancient Temple
scenes.description: A massive tentacled entity with glowing eyes rising behind an altar in a crumbling stone temple, strange symbols carved into pillars, eldritch green glow.

scenes.title: Werewolf Under Full Moon
scenes.description: A werewolf mid-transformation on a rocky hillside, back arched, claws extended, full moon blazing through torn clouds, dead tree silhouettes.

scenes.title: Witch's Coven in Storm Tower
scenes.description: Three hooded figures gathered around a brazier in a ruined stone tower during a thunderstorm, lightning through arrow slits, shadowy familiars perched in rafters.

scenes.title: The Devil's Bargain
scenes.description: A sharply-dressed devil with a thin smile and elongated shadow leaning across a desk toward a desperate man, candlelight casting huge distorted shadows on the wall, occult symbols carved into the wood.

scenes.title: Hellboy at the Gate
scenes.description: A large horned dark figure with a heavy stone hand standing before a massive ornate stone gate that glows with fiery runes, tendrils of smoke, ancient statues on either side.

scenes.title: The Corpse Bridge
scenes.description: A decrepit stone bridge spanning a chasm of mist, skeletal figures standing motionless along its length, a lone traveler with a lantern halfway across, skull-topped pillars.

scenes.title: The Drowned Fisherman
scenes.description: A gaunt fisherman in rain gear hauling a net filled with tangled seaweed and bones from black water, his boat lantern the only light, massive shapes moving beneath the surface.

scenes.title: Clockwork Devil
scenes.description: A mechanical demon constructed of tarnished brass and rusted iron, gears exposed through its ribcage, steam rising from its joints, standing in a Victorian workshop filled with strange machines.
